content:
• Evaluate the core logic and effectiveness of the method against the principles identified in step (1).
  • Identify its inherent weaknesses, potential failure points ("shatterpoints"), and conceptual limitations ("blindspots"), especially regarding the project's vast thematic scope.
  • Propose specific ways each method could be improved, expanded, or evolved for better performance and creativity.
  • Develop a detailed prompt/response overview for the first methodology. The prompt will use specific concepts from our conversation (e.g., '$CDX[PROTO::(VRT)]) as input. The response will provide a list of 'git'-compliant names (e.g., 'et4l-codex-veritas-protocol') and a rationale connecting back to our system's logic.
